**Argentina's victory over England in the World Cup semifinal has sent shockwaves around the football world.**
## Context / Background
The highly anticipated match between Argentina and England ended with Argentina emerging victorious, thanks in part to the exceptional skills of Lionel Messi. The win has sparked intense discussion about the tactics employed by England's coach, Thomas Tuchel, with many questioning his decisions during the game.

## Tactical Key Points / Stats Table
| Team | Goals | Possession |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Argentina | 2 | 55% |
| England | 1 | 45% |
The statistics show that Argentina had a slight edge in terms of possession, which ultimately translated into their victory.

> The loss is a tough pill to swallow, but we must learn from our mistakes and move forward. - Harry Kane

## What's Next?
As Argentina moves on to the final, England will have to regroup and reassess their strategy. The team's performance has been a subject of debate, with many feeling that they were missing a crucial piece of the puzzle.
